I don't believe the Bible needs to be "reconciled" with science, as if they're opponents who need a mediator. I believe they're two languages describing one reality. When Genesis says God created the heavens and the earth, I take that literally. When physics says the universe began in a specific... Dust → living being → dust. That's a trajectory. A before, a during, and an after. That's sequence. That's irreversibility. That's the arrow of [[00_Canonical/Glossary/Time|time]]. In simpler terms, the article is trying to establish: > [!abstract]- 📋 Structural Index — The Day Time Began > > **Primary Operation:** TBD > **Domain:** TBD > **Overall Verdict:** TBD > > **Axioms Established:** > - Add anchor links after structural extraction > > **Claims Derived:** > - Add claim anchors aft... contradictions.text: The interesting question isn't whether they conflict — it's what it means that they don't.
The [[00_Canonical/Glossary/Master Equation]] has no $dt$ term. [[Coherence|χ]] is maximal and static — not frozen, but _complete_.

Nothing is degrading because nothing is in time. [[04_THEOPYHISCS/___THE CONVERGENCE TX 6.6/GENESIS TO QUANTUM The Seven-Article Series/02_The First Quantum State|Article 02]] showed you that Eden was a quantum [[Superposition|superposition]] — a state of maintained coherence that collapsed when Adam measured. [[04_THEOPYHISCS/___THE CONVERGENCE TX 6.6/GENESIS TO QUANTUM The Seven-Article Series/03_Free Will in Tw...
But before the Fall, there is no $dt$.
The temporal dimension hasn't opened yet.
The question "what happened first?" has no answer — not because the record is lost, but because the dimension that makes "first" meaningful doesn't exist.
It is _ordered_ — sin enters, but it enters into a world that still has structure, still has language, still has covenant possibility.
What would that look like? **Prediction:** Immediately after the Fall, coherence should be high but decaying.
Lifespans should be long (residual coherence from the pre-Fall state) but trending downward.
But the coupling to entropy was _weak_.
Humans were IN time but barely touched BY it.
The system had entered the temporal frame but hadn't yet felt its full force. ### The Flood: Phase Transition Then everything changes.

We do not claim to have captured God in equations.
We claim that when we look at His creation honestly — with the tools of physics and the revelation of Scripture — the same structure appears in both.

This maps onto the Born Rule decomposition that [[04_THEOPYHISCS/___THE CONVERGENCE TX 6.6/GENESIS TO QUANTUM The Seven-Article Series/05_Why Reality Needs Three|Article 05]] formalizes. ### What's suggestive but needs more work **"The Fall creates time" is the article's biggest claim and its least proven.** The argument is logical: collapse produces definite states, definite states enable distinguishable configur...
This is a stronger claim than "entropy wasn't active yet." It says dt literally didn't exist.

The claim about what Satan did or didn't anticipate is atmospheric storytelling, not physics. **The article assumes Genesis genealogies are historically precise.** The entire lifespan analysis depends on treating the numbers in Genesis 5 and 11 as literal ages.
